mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*)>0 FROM company WHERE email =#{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company (email, password, name, company_name , phone, job_category, pushable , business_number, business_number_verified) values (#{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{companyName}, #{phone}, #{jobCategory}, #{pushable}, #{businessNumber}, #{businessNumberVerified})
mapper.update: UPDATE company SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.select: SELECT job_category FROM company WHERE email = #{email}
